name: Rayquaza
description: It flies endlessly through the ozone layer, consuming meteoroids. The precious minerals in meteoroids fuel its internal mega-reactors.
originLore: Rayquaza patrols the ozone shell, devouring meteoroids that would fracture the planet's atmospheric shield. Mineral fuel from those impacts feeds its mega-reactors.

lore.celestialConcordance: As long as Rayquaza coils through the upper sky, sky and earth remain sealed against stellar debris.

quantumResonators.name: Dragon Ascent
quantumResonators.description: Converts altitude and velocity into a singular piercing vector.

quantumResonators.name: Delta Stream
quantumResonators.description: Nullifies weather lattices across the theater of engagement.
